title: EmeraldCraft
description:
Added some new uses to emerald.
These might contribute to your improvement and make you stronger.
body:
# Overall Introduction
Added some new uses to emerald.
These might contribute to your improvement and make you stronger.
# Refined Emerald Tools
The Refined Emerald class is divided into three tiers: Type Ⅰ![Refined Emerald](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6488588aff72e5b69a7ea086b3abdddf73064a86_0.webp), Type Ⅱ![Refined Emerald Ⅱ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1df07584f7acd5077b541cde10d3572048cda00a_0.webp), and Type Ⅲ![Refined Emerald Ⅲ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/972869fd68dfb27ab8d4d636714ab78e5d5d3b2e_0.webp). Type Ⅰ can be crafted at a crafting table, while Type Ⅱ and Type Ⅲ require using the previous tier's Refined Emerald by right-clicking on the corresponding tier's Refined Emerald block (for example, to obtain Refined Emerald Ⅱ, you need to hold Refined Emerald Ⅰ and right-click on Refined Emerald block Ⅰ).

The Type Ⅰ and Type Ⅱ Refined Emerald tools only have some auxiliary functions, but Type Ⅲ Refined Emerald tools far surpass the capabilities of the standard Netherite tools, making them incredibly useful for various operations! Additionally, Type Ⅲ Refined Emerald tools possess special skills.

Of course, as expected, Refined Emerald tools Ⅲ also come with certain risks.





# Void Emerald Tools (The version 1.1.0 (inclusive) and later)
The Refined Emerald Ⅱ can also choose not to be upgraded to Refined Emerald Ⅲ and instead pursue an alternative path: the Void Emerald class.
![Void Emerald](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/69b0192d340df100374225fee6f025e73576b1f4_0.webp)
Void Emerald tools possess unique special skills that differ from those of Refined Emerald Ⅲ tools, but they require the corresponding diamond tools to be crafted at a forge table.
